hero.title: Manage clients, projects & ads
hero.description: MarketFlow is the CRM platform built for digital agencies. Track leads, manage projects, monitor ad budgets, and log time — all in one modern interface.

contacts.title: Client Management
contacts.description: Manage all your clients with contact info, budgets, ratings, and status in one place.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.description: Create and track projects with tasks, deadlines, budgets, and team assignments.

googleAds.title: Google ADS Tracking
googleAds.description: Monitor daily budgets, spending, clicks, and conversions per client.

timeTracking.title: Time Tracking
timeTracking.description: Log work hours per project and view summaries by day and person.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Set up rules for reminders, status updates, and budget warnings.

analytics.title: Reports & Analytics
analytics.description: Get insights with dashboards, charts, and statistics for your entire business.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you

footer.tagline: The CRM platform for digital agencies.

login.title: Log in to MarketFlow
login.description: Sign in with your Google account to access your CRM.
